name: clickhouse-query
title: ClickHouse Query
description: Read-only HTTP client to explore the yulai event-tracking ClickHouse: HTTP requests and business actions (who does what, how often, how fast, trends, anomalies).
setup_instructions: Configure the ClickHouse HTTP endpoint and credentials for the yulai event store. This skill holds no secrets in the repo — they are stored locally in the skill's .env. The connection only issues read-only queries.

install.linux: sudo apt-get install -y curl || sudo yum install -y curl

fields.name: endpoint
fields.label: ClickHouse HTTP endpoint
fields.help: Base URL of the ClickHouse HTTP interface, e.g. https://your-clickhouse-host (no trailing slash).

fields.name: host_header
fields.label: Host header (optional)
fields.help: Only needed when hitting an internal load balancer DNS that routes by host. Leave blank otherwise.

fields.name: password
fields.label: ClickHouse password
fields.help: Password for the ClickHouse user. Pull it from your secrets manager and paste it here.

fields.name: tenant
fields.label: Default tenant
fields.help: Default tenant for convenience commands (production is app.sytex.io).
